name: Circuit RL
description: Calculez la constante de temps d'un circuit RL.
seo_description: Calculez la constante de temps d'un circuit RL. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Calculatrice facile a utiliser avec decomposition de la formule.
example_label: Calculezte the time constant and Final current for an RL circuit with L=0.5 H and R=25 Ω.
result_context: The time constant {tau} s determines how fast current reaches Final value {current_final} A.
formula_display: Ïâ€ž = L ÷ R, I_final = V ÷ R (assuming V = 10V)
steps: Inductance L = 0.5 H, Resistance R = 25 Ω
mistakes: Confusing RL with RC time constant formule
Not understanding that current reaches 63% in one time constant
Forgetting that inductor opposes current change
